Policy: reference parent state must be selected from target-blind coordinate/source convention
branch stationary point must solve F_B(Phi_0,B)=0 under declared branch equation
null directions of L_B candidate must be declared before inversion
gauge-like or coordinate redundancy directions must be excluded before inversion
outcome-derived directions are forbidden and projected out if present
P_red = I - P_null - P_gauge - P_forbidden after bases are frozen
L_B^red must be invertible or regularized by predeclared rule on P_red domain
